channel.title: 1. WELCOME on A Cardinal's Wings
channel.description: Recent content in 1. WELCOME on A Cardinal's Wings

item.title: 1.1 Changing our POV
item.description:
Changing Your POV#

“Unless you make the subconscious conscious, it will direct your life and you will call it fate.”
— Carl Jung

TLDR#

Shifting your POV (I’ll denote it as PS for Pov Shift) is very difficult, but it is probably the most effective way to change yourself, and maybe others.

Our paradigms shape our attitude and behaviors, which shape our actions.

I like this example: if you see everybody in your class as an opponent, you simply won’t see opportunities that could benefit everybody — especially when that would actually put you in a better spot than your solo grinding!

item.title: 1.2 How to receive advice?
item.description:
How Do We Get New Maps?#

TLDR#

Maps, or paradigms, are powerful.

Good information shows us a more accurate map.

We can build better maps by having good connections with people and reading good books, among other ways.

Above all: use what we learn.

We shouldn’t hoard knowledge like we’re in a zombie apocalypse, because thoughts unrealized are wasted.

It’s incredibly difficult to understand something without actually using it, because life is often smarter than our ruminations.
